rationale: Educ. Code §31.1011 governs certification of instructional materials provision by school districts. It has no operative connection to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Each school district and open-enrollment charter school shall annually certify to the State Board of Education and the commissioner that:
_note: No conflict identified; the rule text concerns instructional materials certification and is unrelated to homestead exemption valuation.
